source_to_targets_total: What total flow leaves "{source_label}" for target nodes {target_labels}?
What is the combined flow from source node "{source_label}" to target nodes {target_labels}?
For source node "{source_label}", what total flow goes to target nodes {target_labels}?
What total value is sent from "{source_label}" to target nodes {target_labels}?
From "{source_label}" to target nodes {target_labels}, what is the total flow?
sources_to_target_total: What total flow enters "{target_label}" from source nodes {source_labels}?
What is the combined flow from source nodes {source_labels} into target node "{target_label}"?
For target node "{target_label}", what total flow comes from source nodes {source_labels}?
What total value is sent from source nodes {source_labels} to "{target_label}"?
From source nodes {source_labels} to "{target_label}", what is the total flow?
largest_target_for_source: For source node "{source_label}", which target receives the largest flow?
Among all curved bands leaving "{source_label}", which target label has the highest value?
For every flow from "{source_label}". Which target gets the largest printed value?
Which target node receives the maximum flow from source "{source_label}"?
From "{source_label}", identify the target connected by the largest-value band.
largest_source_for_target: For target node "{target_label}", which source sends the largest flow?
Among all curved bands entering "{target_label}", which source label has the highest value?
For every flow into "{target_label}". Which source sends the largest printed value?
Which source node sends the maximum flow to target "{target_label}"?
Into "{target_label}", identify the source connected by the largest-value band.

Answer format: {answer_hint}.

Answer field: {answer_hint}.

Required answer format: {answer_hint}.

Final answer format: {answer_hint}.

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.

query:source_to_targets_total.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer total
query:source_to_targets_total.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the printed flow-value labels used in the calculation

query:sources_to_target_total.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer total
query:sources_to_target_total.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the printed flow-value labels used in the calculation

query:largest_target_for_source.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible target label as a string
query:largest_target_for_source.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the selected target node

query:largest_source_for_target.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible source label as a string
query:largest_source_for_target.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the selected source node
